reviews.comment:
Estación de servicio grande. Se puede comprar comida (sencilla), tiene una amplia zona arbolada, y baños grandes, limpios, con canillas automáticas.
Se ve todo bien mantenido.

(Translated by Google)
Large gas station. You can buy (simple) food, it has a large wooded area, and large, clean restrooms with automatic faucets.
Everything looks well maintained.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRaXBUNjFnRRAB
